Info about Setsuyu

•Setsuyu is an artic fox, and also a skilled huntress. She is friends with Idate and Rocma (yeah I know is complicated). She dislikes Yukisada because they don't get along very well and Shirogane because she sees him as a wimp. She has babysitted Mafuyu before.
